General.Name: China Silver Technology Holdings Limited
General.Description: China Silver Technology Holdings Limited manufactures and trades in light emitting diode (LED) lighting products and printed circuit boards (PCBs) in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, other Asian countries, Hungary, Turkey, Germany, and rest of Europe. It operates through Manufacturing and Trading of Single-Sided PCB; Manufacturing and Trading of Double-Sided PCB; and Manufacturing and Trading of Multi-Layered PCB segments. The company also trades in towers and electric cables. Its products are used in consumer electronics, computers and computer peripherals, and communications equipment. The company was formerly known as TC Orient Lighting Holdings Limited and changed its name to China Silver Technology Holdings Limited in July 2020. China Silver Technology Holdings Limited was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Yuen Long, Hong Kong.
